text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess shows up to our meeting with
a furrowed expression.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ughhh! My head is still throbbing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I love having rose-petal baths, but the smell of a
fine incense or perfume is also refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Roses are so beautiful, but they also have strong
thorns—just like a fighting princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just got the best idea! I should round up
these different rose-scented products...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And use them all at once! That way, I can enjoy
the essence of roses even more!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Their sweet fragrances will give an explosive
boost to my princess level!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...But it turns out that using them all at once was
overkill, and I ended up with this massive
headache.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I aired my room out to get rid of the
scent, but the headache still won't go away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ouch! Ughh... It even hurts to raise my voice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is troubled by the pain of her
seemingly chronic headache.
